display.name: Schooling Fish
display.author: prism
display.blurb: A tight school of silver fish moving as one organism through a tropical reef, dappled light, slow camera orbit at depth.

annotation.technical_notes: A dense field of crystalline particles is generated via custom wave equations, forming an undulating 3D terrain. Per-frame equations drive the vertical displacement and wave amplitude in response to the bass, while mid-range frequencies induce a high-frequency jitter across the individual shards. A subtle warp field keeps the particle grid fluidly drifting across the dark viewport.
